name: kmty-financial-forecaster
description: 昆明统一生物科技有限公司 · 财务分析系统 — weekly-keyed full-year cash-flow forecaster (static, dependency-free).

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/src && cp index.html styles.css dist/ && cp src/engine.js src/store.js src/app.js dist/src/
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist
